name: node-normalize-path
title: node-normalize-path
summary: Normalize file path slashes to be unix-like forward slashes
description:
Normalize file path slashes to be unix-like forward slashes
Normalize file path slashes to be unix-like forward slashes. Also condenses
repeat slashes to a single slash and removes trailing slashes.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-normalize-path because Normalize file path slashes to be unix-like forward slashes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-normalize-path as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-normalize-path with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-normalize-path --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
